channel.title: Ageless Linux: Updates
channel.description: News and Commentary from the Ageless Linux project

item.title: systemd ships birthDate field; distro tracker updated
item.description: systemd PR #40954 merged March 18, adding a birthDate field to user records — the data layer for the emerging age verification stack. Distro tracker updated with systemd (upstream), NixOS, Artix Linux, and Kicksecure/Whonix status change. Emerging Standard section rewritten for the systemd + xdg-desktop-portal pipeline.

item.title: Ageless Linux — State Law Tracker
item.description: Added Illinois, New York, and Brazil to state law tracker; expanded timeline and penalty tables

item.title: Ageless Linux — Distro Compliance Tracker
item.description: Added Arch Linux 32 (excluding CA + BR), updated MidnightBSD to reflect Brazil exclusion, added source citations
